facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past Nhà hàng hải sản Xưa và Nay. Their loss. This seafood spot on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo pulls a 4.5★ from 193 reviews and keeps its prices at $15-30 a head. Fresh catch, no beach-club markup, no tourist-trap energy. Just solid Phu Quoc seafood done right. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
